PHASE_7_TICKET_3_NOTES:
  - Stale .whatsnext claim: candidate (b) said "page.tsx currently 404" — actual: page + form existed since Phase 4 Part 5d. Surveyed before assuming; pivoted scope from "build the form" to "test backfill + UI Rule #4 polish" (user-approved via AskUserQuestion).
  - Test pattern reuse confirmed: the [[trpc-test-pattern]] entry from #2 ported cleanly to a protectedProcedure router. Differences from authRouter test: mock `prisma` (not `platformPrisma`); mock `runWithTenantContext` as a pass-through `(ctx, fn) => fn()`; provide full session.user (id + email + name + displayName + organizationId + role + isSuperAdmin + securityVersion) since the protectedProcedure auth-middleware narrows from it.
  - Prisma fluent-return cast pattern: `vi.mocked(prisma.X.create).mockImplementation((async args => {...}) as never)` — must cast the WHOLE arrow function, not just the return value. Prisma's DynamicModelExtensionFluentApi return type is intersected with PrismaPromise; `as never` on the inner return doesn't satisfy the outer function signature. See lessons.md entry from this session.
  - Namespace imports + @typescript-eslint/consistent-type-imports: `import * as LabelPrimitive` failed lint when only used in `typeof X.Y` positions. Two fixes: (i) convert React namespace to named imports (createContext, forwardRef, useContext, useId, type ComponentPropsWithoutRef, type ElementRef, type HTMLAttributes); (ii) drop LabelPrimitive entirely — use `typeof Label` (the local re-export forwardRef) for ref/props.
  - shadcn Form primitive added: closes UI Rule #4 gap (forms must use shadcn Form + RHF + Zod). Pattern for future Phase 7 form work: just import `{ Form, FormField, FormItem, ... }` from `@yelli/ui`. Already exported from barrel.
  - Visual QA (Rule 16) deferred: auth-gated routes need login credentials the agent cannot read (CREDENTIALS.md is gitignore + never-read-into-context per security.md). Practical interpretation: unit tests + clean build accepted as sufficient coverage for mechanical RHF migrations; manual smoke pending next dev-up session.
